sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n5742" key="a)mfi/broxos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀμφίβροχος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n5742.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">thoroughly soaked,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.27</biblScope> </bibl> (Antip.).</sense> </entryFree>
